我们在寻找 “供应商成功伙伴” 与 “平台生态运营官” 的结合体。

一、 岗位职责
供应商评估与档案管理 (30%)

根据公司标准，对新老供应商的商品竞争力、价格竞争力、市场影响力及合作配合度进行周期性评估与打分，形成评估报告。

建立并维护精准、完整的供应商电子档案，包括基础资料、合同、评估历史、沟通记录、绩效数据等，实现供应商信息的体系化管理。

日常运营支持与维护 (40%)

主动沟通：定期与供应商进行一对一沟通，传达平台政策、市场趋势及运营要求，收集反馈与需求。

上款与商品管理：跟踪、敦促供应商按计划上新款式，并提供上款指导。

信息同步：负责供应商端商品价格调整、库存变动的及时更新与平台同步，确保前台信息绝对准确，避免超卖错卖。

问题解决：快速响应并协调处理供应商在订单、物流（联动春风物流）、结算、系统操作中遇到的问题。

平台协同与策略执行 (30%)

清晰、准确地向供应商传递公司战略、市场活动及运营方案，并推动其积极参与配合。

向买手及运营团队反馈供应商端的商品动态、产能情况及促销意愿，助力精准选品与活动策划。

协助运营活动落地，如活动报名审核、资源协调、数据跟踪与复盘。

二、 岗位要求
任职资格

本科及以上学历，211、985或硕士研究生优先，电子商务、市场营销、供应链管理、纺织服装类专业优先。

1年以上电商平台供应商支持、客户成功、品类运营或服装行业跟单/买手助理经验。

熟练使用Office办公软件，尤其擅长使用Excel进行数据整理与分析。

能力要求

评估分析能力：能理解并运用多维度评估模型，对商业信息有基本的判断力。

极致沟通能力：具备优秀的书面和口头表达能力，善于跨部门协作与外部商务沟通。

细节掌控能力：对数字、流程、时间节点有高度的严谨性，追求零差错。

客户导向思维：以服务创造价值，能换位思考，维护良好合作关系。

聚焦公司三大标准成熟业务：虚拟电厂解决方案、光伏电站运维系统、微电网管控平台，面向新能源企业、光伏电站运营商、园区管委会、电力公司等客户，通过线下拜访、行业展会、客户转介绍、线上精准营销等方式挖掘需求，建立完整客户档案与跟进台账，推动标准方案快速成交。
完成公司下达的月度、季度、年度销售目标（月度销售额 12-20 万元），依托标准产品优势拆解任务，聚焦客户 “能源管控优化、运维效率提升、政策合规达标” 等核心需求，简化沟通流程，缩短成交周期。
维护老客户合作关系，每季度定期回访核心客户（光伏电站、园区能源运营方），跟进标准系统运维反馈、版本升级需求，协调技术团队提供标准化支持，提升客户复购率（如新增电站运维接入、系统扩容），客户满意度保持在 95% 以上。
跟进销售全流程：从客户需求匹配、标准方案演示（虚拟电厂调度 / 光伏运维大屏 / 微电网管控实操）、标准化报价、合同签订到回款跟进，依托成熟产品手册与案例库，独立完成沟通转化，技术团队提供辅助支撑，确保回款周期不超过 60 天。
收集虚拟电厂、光伏运维、微电网领域的行业政策（双碳、新能源补贴）、竞品标准方案动态、客户反馈等信息，每周提交市场简报，为公司标准产品优化与政策适配提供建议。
配合公司组织的新能源行业展会（如储能展、光伏展）、标准产品推广会，负责客户邀约、现场标准方案演示与意向转化，突出产品 “标准化、易落地、高性价比” 优势。
遵守公司销售管理制度，每日提交客户跟进记录，每周上报销售进度，每月参与团队复盘，分享标准业务快速成交技巧与客户资源。
二、任职要求
（一）硬性要求
学历：统招大专及以上学历，市场营销、工商管理、新能源科学与工程、电气工程、自动化等相关专业优先，优秀者可放宽至高中；
经验：1-3 年 B 端销售工作经验，有虚拟电厂、光伏电站、微电网、储能等新能源领域销售经验者优先。
技能：熟练使用 Office 办公软件（Word/Excel/PPT），能独立演示标准产品、讲解方案手册，会操作 CRM 客户管理系统（如启智协同 CRM）者优先；
其他：普通话流利，沟通表达逻辑清晰；能接受每月 3-5 次出差（新能源产业集中区域），持有 C1 及以上驾照者优先。
（二）软性要求
目标感强：对销售业绩有明确追求，适应新能源标准业务 “快速匹配、快速成交” 特点，能主动抗压并拆解目标；
需求匹配能力：熟悉虚拟电厂、光伏运维、微电网的核心应用场景，能快速判断客户需求与标准产品的适配性，精准传递产品核心价值；
责任心强：对客户承诺与工作结果负责，严格跟进合同签订与回款流程，确保标准业务闭环高效；
学习能力：快速掌握公司虚拟电厂、光伏电站运维系统、微电网标准产品的功能亮点、落地案例与报价体系，了解新能源行业政策与市场趋势；

主要工作职责:
1、客户关系与沟通:作为客户的主要对接窗口，维护并深化客户关系，及时了解客户整体需求，提供高水平的服务支持。
2、新专案管理与导入:负责新客户、新产品的引入和追踪，协调内部资源，推动新产品顺利完成验证并快速转入量产阶段
3、异常问题处理:主动跟踪客户反馈的产品质星及运行状兄，与质量、工程、生产等相关部门紧密协作，推动内部流程改善，高效解决客户端的各类异常问题。
4、营收与交付管理:每日监控客户订单完成率及收入状况，与客户及销售团队协同合作，制定并管理产能分配计划，确保公司月度及年度营收与交付目标(FCST)的达成。
5、策略与系统维护:参与整合并执行客户策略，建立并维护客户数据库系统，负责客户季度业务回顾(QBR)、客户来访安排及合约签著等日常管理工作。

任职资格要求:
1.学历与专业:本科及以上学历，机械工程及自动化、电子工程、工业工程或相关理工科专业背景。
2.工作经验:拥有7年及以上半导体、电子制造或相关行业的客户项目管理、客户服务或工程支持经验。有新产品导入(NP)经验者优先。熟恶半导体封测流程优先考量。
3.语言能力:具备良好的英语听说读写能力，英语可用作工作语言可优先考虑。4.其他:
卓越的沟通协调能力:能够作为高效的沟通桥梁，与内外部不同团队进行顺畅协作。
出色的客户服务意识:以客户为中心，主动发现问题并推动解决，提升客户满意度。
强大的推动与执行力:具备结果导向思维，能有效驱动跨部门团队解决问题，确保项目按时完成。
良好的数据分析能力:能够跟踪和管理营收、达成率等数据，为决策提供支持。

1. 市场与客户开发
针对农贸批发、商超零售、餐饮连锁、加工厂等不同渠道，制定并执行客户开发计划。
定期拜访潜在客户，了解其采购需求、供货周期、结算方式等，建立长期合作关系。
收集市场行情、竞争对手动态，为公司制定价格和销售策略提供依据。
2. 多渠道销售与订单管理
负责各渠道的产品报价、合同签订、订单跟进及发货安排。
农贸批发：根据批发客户的需求进行批量配送，确保准时交付。
商超零售：配合门店陈列、促销活动，维护货架商品充足与整齐。
餐饮供应：根据餐厅菜单及用量制定稳定供货计划，保障食材新鲜度。
加工厂：对接原料规格、质量标准，跟踪加工进度及出货安排。
3. 产品知识与技术支持
熟悉各类生鲜肉制品的品种、规格、储存条件及加工用途。
能为餐饮客户提供菜品搭配建议、成本优化方案；为加工厂提供原料选用指导。
解答客户关于产品质量、运输、储存等方面的疑问。
4. 售后服务与客户关系维护
跟进客户收货情况，及时处理退换货和质量投诉。
定期回访客户，收集反馈意见，提升满意度和复购率。
建立客户档案，记录采购历史与偏好，便于精准营销。
5. 销售数据与库存协调
汇总各渠道销售数据，分析销量趋势、毛利水平，提出改进建议。
与仓储、物流部门协调，确保不同渠道库存充足且不积压。
控制损耗，优化配送路线和频次，降低成本。
6. 合规与安全管理
严格执行食品安全法和相关行业标准，确保销售环节可追溯。
确保所有票据、检验报告齐全，满足客户及监管部门要求。
遵守公司各项管理制度，防范经营风险。
任职要求：
1. 基本条件
年龄 20-35 岁，身体健康，持有效健康证；能适应弹性工作时间，包括早市、夜市、节假日及轮班。
有生鲜肉制品或相关食品销售经验，熟悉农贸批发、商超、餐饮、加工厂任一或多个渠道者优先。
2. 专业知识
了解生鲜肉制品的分类、品质鉴别、储存及运输要求。
熟悉不同渠道的业务流程，如批发结算方式、商超进场流程、餐饮配送规范、加工厂原料验收标准。
掌握食品安全相关法律法规。
3. 技能要求
具备较强的客户沟通能力与市场开拓能力。
能独立完成从客户接洽、报价、谈判到合同签订的全流程。
熟练使用办公软件及进销存管理系统。
有一定的数据分析能力，能从销售数据中找出问题和机会。
4. 个人素质
责任心强，抗压能力好，能接受业绩考核。
诚实守信，具有良好的商业道德和团队合作精神。
服务意识佳，善于维护客户关系。
5. 其他要求
能适应出差或外勤工作（如跑农贸市场、餐饮门店、加工厂）。
有驾照且能熟练驾驶者优先（方便拜访客户及配送协调）。

8.内外部资源关系管理及沟通，确保项目落地与用户满意；

LexisNexis Legal & Professional, which serves customers in more than 150 countries with 11,300 employees worldwide, is part of RELX, a global provider of information-based analytics and decision tools for professional and business customers.
About the Role
This position provides leadership, management, direction, and vision to software engineers and/or development employees including offshore contractors/consultants and interns needed to support, run, and change activities in the software development life cycle. The position works closely with development peers, product and project leaders/managers, and other in-house software developers as well as directs the successful completion and delivery of respective software components and any other related deliverables. The position is additionally expected to report progress to senior management. Additional responsibilities may include oversight of the department budget, identifying and supporting talent, and defining resource requirements and allocations
Key Responsibilities
Technical Leadership & Delivery
•	Own the technical vision and roadmap for AI/ML capabilities across one or more product areas, ensuring scalability, reliability, and performance of ML systems in production.
•	Lead design and implementation of end-to-end AI solutions using LLMs, RAG, agentic systems, MCP, and vector databases on AWS / Azure / GCP.
•	Guide teams in building robust data and ML platforms, including data ingestion, feature engineering, experimentation, CI/CD for ML (MLOps), and observability.
•	Review and contribute to high-impact code, architectures, and design documents; ensure adherence to engineering and architectural standards.
•	Champion test-driven development, automated testing, and secure coding practices across services and ML pipelines.
JD-Machine Learning Mgr
•	Oversee system and user acceptance testing cycles to ensure high-quality, reliable business solutions.
People & Team Management
•	Manage, coach, and grow a high-performing team of software / ML / data / MLOps engineers, including offshore or partner resources where applicable.
•	Drive performance management: set clear goals, provide ongoing feedback, conduct reviews, and support career development and upskilling in AI/ML technologies.
•	Foster a culture of ownership, psychological safety, experimentation, and continuous improvement.
•	Plan and allocate resources effectively across initiatives, balancing roadmap delivery, technical debt, and innovation.
Stakeholder & Partner Management
•	Collaborate with product management and business stakeholders to define AI use cases, success metrics, and delivery plans.
•	Serve as primary technical point of contact for external technology partners and vendors, including offshore teams and managed service providers.
•	Communicate technical strategy, tradeoffs, and progress to senior leadership in a clear, outcome-oriented way.
•	Work with operations, security, and compliance teams to ensure AI solutions meet regulatory, privacy, and ethical standards.
Governance, Standards & Strategy
•	Define and enforce engineering best practices, coding standards, and architectural guardrails for AI/ML systems.
•	Contribute to the evolution of enterprise data and AI architecture, ensuring alignment with broader technology strategy.
•	Participate in budget planning and tracking for team headcount, tooling, and cloud / compute resources.
•	Stay current with industry trends in generative AI, LLMs, vector search, and ML platforms; recommend pragmatic adoption paths.
Required Qualifications
•	10+ years of professional software development and/or data/ML engineering experience, including delivering production systems at scale.
JD-Machine Learning Mgr
•	2+ years of people management experience leading engineering or ML teams (hiring, coaching, performance management, and resource planning).
•	Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or related field; advanced degree (MSc/PhD) in ML/AI or related area preferred.
Technical Skills
•	Deep expertise in modern AI/ML technologies, including:
•	
o	Large Language Models (LLMs), retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and agentic workflows.
o	Vector databases and similarity search.
o	Cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and cloud-native architectures (containers, Kubernetes, serverless).
•	Strong proficiency in Python and ML engineering best practices (modular code, testing, packaging, CI/CD).
•	Hands-on experience with ML frameworks and tools such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn, Hugging Face, and orchestration/ML Ops tooling (e.g., Kubeflow, MLflow, SageMaker, Vertex AI, Databricks).
•	Strong foundation in data modeling, SQL and NoSQL databases, and working with large, complex data sets.
•	Proven experience designing and operating large-scale, distributed systems with high availability and observability.
•	Experience leading or collaborating with offshore or partner teams, including managed services and staff augmentation models.
Core Competencies
•	Strategic Thinking: Ability to translate business goals into an AI/ML roadmap and make sound trade-offs across scope, quality, and timelines.
•	Execution & Delivery: Strong project planning, prioritization, and change-management skills across multiple initiatives and stakeholders.
•	Problem Solving: Advanced skills in diagnosing complex technical and delivery issues and driving teams toward pragmatic solutions.
•	Communication & Influence: Excellent written and verbal communication; able to explain complex technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders and senior executives.
•	People Leadership: Demonstrated ability to build, motivate, and retain diverse technical teams and foster an inclusive, high-trust environment.
•	Customer Focus: Passion for understanding end-user needs and using AI/ML to deliver measurable value.", "jobHref": About the Role
This position provides leadership, management, direction, and vision to software engineers and/or development employees including offshore contractors/consultants and interns needed to support, run, and change activities in the software development life cycle. The position works closely with development peers, product and project leaders/managers, and other in-house software developers as well as directs the successful completion and delivery of respective software components and any other related deliverables. The position is additionally expected to report progress to senior management. Additional responsibilities may include oversight of the department budget, identifying and supporting talent, and defining resource requirements and allocations
Key Responsibilities
Technical Leadership & Delivery
•	Own the technical vision and roadmap for AI/ML capabilities across one or more product areas, ensuring scalability, reliability, and performance of ML systems in production.
•	Lead design and implementation of end-to-end AI solutions using LLMs, RAG, agentic systems, MCP, and vector databases on AWS / Azure / GCP.
•	Guide teams in building robust data and ML platforms, including data ingestion, feature engineering, experimentation, CI/CD for ML (MLOps), and observability.
•	Review and contribute to high-impact code, architectures, and design documents; ensure adherence to engineering and architectural standards.
•	Champion test-driven development, automated testing, and secure coding practices across services and ML pipelines.
JD-Machine Learning Mgr
•	Oversee system and user acceptance testing cycles to ensure high-quality, reliable business solutions.
People & Team Management
•	Manage, coach, and grow a high-performing team of software / ML / data / MLOps engineers, including offshore or partner resources where applicable.
•	Drive performance management: set clear goals, provide ongoing feedback, conduct reviews, and support career development and upskilling in AI/ML technologies.
•	Foster a culture of ownership, psychological safety, experimentation, and continuous improvement.
•	Plan and allocate resources effectively across initiatives, balancing roadmap delivery, technical debt, and innovation.
Stakeholder & Partner Management
•	Collaborate with product management and business stakeholders to define AI use cases, success metrics, and delivery plans.
•	Serve as primary technical point of contact for external technology partners and vendors, including offshore teams and managed service providers.
•	Communicate technical strategy, tradeoffs, and progress to senior leadership in a clear, outcome-oriented way.
•	Work with operations, security, and compliance teams to ensure AI solutions meet regulatory, privacy, and ethical standards.
Governance, Standards & Strategy
•	Define and enforce engineering best practices, coding standards, and architectural guardrails for AI/ML systems.
•	Contribute to the evolution of enterprise data and AI architecture, ensuring alignment with broader technology strategy.
•	Participate in budget planning and tracking for team headcount, tooling, and cloud / compute resources.
•	Stay current with industry trends in generative AI, LLMs, vector search, and ML platforms; recommend pragmatic adoption paths.
Required Qualifications
•	10+ years of professional software development and/or data/ML engineering experience, including delivering production systems at scale.
JD-Machine Learning Mgr
•	2+ years of people management experience leading engineering or ML teams (hiring, coaching, performance management, and resource planning).
•	Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or related field; advanced degree (MSc/PhD) in ML/AI or related area preferred.
Technical Skills
•	Deep expertise in modern AI/ML technologies, including:
•	
o	Large Language Models (LLMs), retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and agentic workflows.
o	Vector databases and similarity search.
o	Cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and cloud-native architectures (containers, Kubernetes, serverless).
•	Strong proficiency in Python and ML engineering best practices (modular code, testing, packaging, CI/CD).
•	Hands-on experience with ML frameworks and tools such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn, Hugging Face, and orchestration/ML Ops tooling (e.g., Kubeflow, MLflow, SageMaker, Vertex AI, Databricks).
•	Strong foundation in data modeling, SQL and NoSQL databases, and working with large, complex data sets.
•	Proven experience designing and operating large-scale, distributed systems with high availability and observability.
•	Experience leading or collaborating with offshore or partner teams, including managed services and staff augmentation models.
Core Competencies
•	Strategic Thinking: Ability to translate business goals into an AI/ML roadmap and make sound trade-offs across scope, quality, and timelines.
•	Execution & Delivery: Strong project planning, prioritization, and change-management skills across multiple initiatives and stakeholders.
•	Problem Solving: Advanced skills in diagnosing complex technical and delivery issues and driving teams toward pragmatic solutions.
•	Communication & Influence: Excellent written and verbal communication; able to explain complex technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders and senior executives.
•	People Leadership: Demonstrated ability to build, motivate, and retain diverse technical teams and foster an inclusive, high-trust environment.
•	Customer Focus: Passion for understanding end-user needs and using AI/ML to deliver measurable value.", "jobHref": 1.运用OCR及NLP技术，对电子病历、检验报告单、医嘱等医疗文本数据进行精准信息抽取、结构化还原与深度语义理解，支撑临床数据标准化处理；
2.结合临床指南、专家共识及真实诊疗场景，设计并落地提示词工程、思维链、代理编排等方案，引导大模型生成符合临床逻辑、合规严谨的辅助诊断建议；
3.负责医疗知识图谱与向量数据库的融合优化，通过RAG等核心技术，降低大模型在医学专业领域的幻觉问题，确保输出内容的权威性、准确性与可溯源性；
4.构建医疗场景专属的模型评估范式，针对模型生成结果的准确率、临床逻辑性、医疗安全性等关键指标开展系统性评估与迭代测试，规避临床应用风险；
5.遵守公司技术规范与工作流程，主动配合跨部门协作，推动技术方案落地与产品优化。
任职资格:
1.硕士及以上学历，人工智能、计算机科学与技术、信号与信息处理、模式识别、生物医学工程、数据科学等相关专业；
2.扎实掌握NLP/LLM基础理论，深入理解大模型推理流程、参数配置逻辑，熟练使用PyTorch深度学习框架，具备大模型应用相关项目经验者优先；
